name: Icikgua, Colonel Trebere of the Achty'ai Guard
notes: Current open contract. Method and tool pending client instruction.
notes_intel:
Surrounding Security
Weaponry: Personal detail uses heavy blaster pistols (stun-modded); ceremonial guards use vibro-polearms.
Tactical Flaw: Standard armor has an exposed cooling vent at the base of the neck.
Internal Discord: High resentment over nepotism (Trebere promoted a relative over a favored Lieutenant). Guards are likely to delay their response to any "accident."

Target Habits
The Window: Every third solar cycle, Trebere isolates himself on his private terrace overlooking Achty'ai Plaza for exactly 20 minutes.
Blind Spot: He orders his guards to the other side of a soundproofed, reinforced door.
The Kill Zone: During this time, he stands at the ledge with his back turned, his senses dulled by off-world cigars and the Plaza’s ambient noise. No secondary sensors are active on the exterior.
notes_exec:
Cigars laced and back in the package well before arrival. Sedative is contact-based, lips, fingers, doesn't matter. He wouldn't know until his legs stopped listening to him.

Balcony entry. No gear, no noise. I pulled myself out of the light entirely, became invisible. I waited. The room was mine the moment I cleared the railing.

He felt it coming and had no name for it. Heavy. Slow. That was the window.

One movement. The vibro-polearm found the neck. It was over before his body decided to care.

Noose went on. The sign was rewired on-site. Nepotism's bitch. Both hands bound around it, tight enough that the drop wouldn't shake it loose. He held that sign. He didn't get a choice in death any more than he gave others one in life.

Dragged him to the railing. Rope secured. Dropped him.

The street found him.
notes_exfil:
Waited. Stayed invisible, stayed still. Let the scene do its work.

The body was found. Voices, then boots, then the door swung open and stayed that way. Guards don't close doors when they're panicking.

I walked out behind them.

They were too busy looking at him.

Contract sealed.

rolls.situation: Investigation of the surrounding individuals of the target.
Injection of a neuro-sedative into the cigars of the target.
Infiltration into the quarters of the target by climbing.
Use of the force to maintain invisibility throughout the climb and infiltration.
Assassination of the sedated target with a vibro-polearm.
Used the force to disappear from view.
Escape the room while guards are distracted by the find they kindly left the door open.

closed_method: Neck broken by a ceremonial guard vibro-polearm.
closed_notes:
The target is dead and the message was delivered. No complications, no witnesses, no trace left behind worth following.

The cigars did exactly what they were supposed to. The Force held from entry to exit. The sign was readable. The drop was clean.

He was found by his own guards, in his own building, with his own hands holding the verdict. Whatever story they tell about how it happened, they won't have one about who did it.

The garden is tended.
notes_briefing: Unfortunate obstacle in the way, must be taken care of. Ideally, his goons should have the blame pointed at.
